name: Loco-Moko
recipeInstructions:
1. Make 4 patties from the ground beef.
2. Fry or broil the patties until well done.
3. Fry eggs sunny-side up or over easy.
4. Serve 2 scoops of rice on a platter.
5. Place a hamburger patty on top of the rice and one egg on top of the patty.
6. Pour gravy over everything.
7. Add desired seasoning, such as shoyu (soy sauce) or ketchup.
Origin: Somekine Ono Cookbook by Local Grines, a Junior Achievement Company
Formatted by: Dorie Villarreal
